name: MGIC INVESTMENT CORP
business: MGIC Investment Corp provides private mortgage insurance, other mortgage credit risk management solutions, and ancillary services to residential mortgage lenders.

exposures.sentence: we provide private mortgage insurance, other mortgage credit risk management solutions, and ancillary services.

catalysts.event: Executed an excess of loss reinsurance transaction providing up to $184 million of coverage on NIW in 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we executed an XOL Transaction which will provide up to $184 million of reinsurance coverage on NIW in 2026.

catalysts.event: Executed a $324 million excess of loss reinsurance agreement covering policies from January 1, 2022 to March 31, 2025.
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, through an insurance linked note transaction, we executed a $324 million excess of loss reinsurance agreement that covers certain policies written between January 1, 2022 and March 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Executed two 40% quota share reinsurance transactions covering eligible NIW in 2026 and NIW in 2027.
catalysts.sentence: We executed two 40% QSR Transactions with groups of unaffiliated reinsurers covering eligible NIW in 2026 and NIW in 2027.

tamClaims.claim: In 2025, $311 billion of mortgages were insured with primary coverage by private mortgage insurers.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, $311 billion of mortgages were insured with primary coverage by private mortgage insurers, compared to $299 billion in 2024, and $284 billion in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Total estimated primary mortgage insurance (PMI, FHA, USDA, VA) was $818 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Estimated Total of PMI, FHA, USDA, and VA Primary Mortgage Insurance (in billions) Year Ended December 31, 2025: $818
